WPEPlatform

API Version: 2.0

Library Version: 2.52.1

Type
GestureController

cancel get_gesture get_gesture_delta get_gesture_position handle_event is_drag_begin

Generated by gi-docgen 2023.3

Interface

WPEPlatformGestureController

since: 2.0

Description [src] 

interface WPEPlatform.GestureController : GObject.Object

A gesture controller.

This interface enables implementing custom gesture detection algorithms. Objects of classes implementing this interface can be supplied to WPEView so that they are being used instead of the default gesture detector.

Available since: 2.0

Prerequisite

In order to implement GestureController, your type must inherit fromGObject.

Instance methods

wpe_gesture_controller_cancel

Cancels ongoing gesture detection if any.

since: 2.0

wpe_gesture_controller_get_gesture

Get currently detected gesture.

since: 2.0

wpe_gesture_controller_get_gesture_delta

Get the delta of currently detected gesture such as “drag” gesture. If it doesn’t have a delta, FALSE is returned.

since: 2.0

wpe_gesture_controller_get_gesture_position

Get the position of currently detected gesture. If it doesn’t have a position, FALSE is returned.

since: 2.0

wpe_gesture_controller_handle_event

Get the gesture detected by controller if any was detected during processing of event.

since: 2.0

wpe_gesture_controller_is_drag_begin

Check if the current drag gesture is a beginning of the sequence being detected.

since: 2.0

Interface structure 

struct WPEPlatformGestureControllerInterface {
  GTypeInterface parent_interface;
  gboolean (* handle_event) (
    WPEGestureController* controller,
    WPEEvent* event
  );
  void (* cancel) (
    WPEGestureController* controller
  );
  WPEGesture (* get_gesture) (
    WPEGestureController* controller
  );
  gboolean (* get_gesture_position) (
    WPEGestureController* controller,
    double* x,
    double* y
  );
  gboolean (* get_gesture_delta) (
    WPEGestureController* controller,
    double* x,
    double* y
  );
  gboolean (* is_drag_begin) (
    WPEGestureController* controller
  );
  
}
No description available.

Cancels ongoing gesture detection if any.

since: 2.0

WPEPlatform.GestureController.get_gesture

Get currently detected gesture.

since: 2.0

WPEPlatform.GestureController.get_gesture_delta

Get the delta of currently detected gesture such as “drag” gesture. If it doesn’t have a delta, FALSE is returned.

since: 2.0

WPEPlatform.GestureController.get_gesture_position

Get the position of currently detected gesture. If it doesn’t have a position, FALSE is returned.

since: 2.0

WPEPlatform.GestureController.handle_event

Get the gesture detected by controller if any was detected during processing of event.

since: 2.0

WPEPlatform.GestureController.is_drag_begin

Check if the current drag gesture is a beginning of the sequence being detected.

since: 2.0
